programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara arriesga su vida para salvar a Franco de los matones, él le agradece con un beso. Jimena llega a la casa tras burlarse de Óscar y se preocupa por su hermana, a ambas les espera un regaño.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acude a su cita con Juan, pero se va al ver que no está solo, Óscar enfrenta a Jimena delante de Gabriela, quien se indigna al saber lo sucedido. Franco busca desquitarse de los matones.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le inventa a Norma que es novia de Juan, él no se queda tranquilo, busca a la madre de su hijo y trata de aclarar todo cuando otra mentira los separa. Franco pone a Armando en su sitio.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara haría cualquier cosa para conseguir el video hecho por Catalina Lucero, para ella está en juego recuperar la confianza de la familia Parker. Yaya y Víctor sienten por primera vez la responsabilidad de criar a un niño.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Ante Amelia Parker, Marisa acusa a Sara de haber orquestado la separación de su hijo. Sara se hace la víctima. Ahora tiene toda la confianza de la madre de Cristóbal y el descontrol de Marisa juega en su contra. Ty también se pone del lado de Sara.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal se culpa de la separación de Marisa y su hijo, mientras Lalo les hace la vida un infierno a su padre y a su tía. Tras dejarles un inquietante aviso, Hugo vuelve a invadir la casa de Belinda y Goyo y descubre que su ex está embarazada.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Frank le recomienda a Marisa que detenga la boda. Ty le advierte a su hijo que todavía puede suspender lo que considera una farsa. Bruno actúa de forma sospechosa, le prepara una sorpresa a Sara en la entrada de la iglesia y ella deja su celular.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le regresa el niño a Lucecita. Alejandro va a la tumba de Gabriela y Verónica lo escucha decir cuánto todavía la extraña y la ama. Ella siente nostalgia. Antonia está tensa y ordena la muerte de Julio, que ya sabe que Gabriela está viva.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Julio repite el nombre de Gabriela Suárez mientras agoniza, pero no alcanza a decir que ella es Verónica Dantés. Antonia se va quedando cada vez más sola y Poncia se lo hace notar. Alejandro sabe que su mamá no siente nada por la muerte de Montemar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica no quiere que Alejandro se vaya del pueblo. Él aprovecha la oportunidad para repetirle que la ama. En una misión especial a San Pedro, el comisionado Balmaceda tiene su primer enfrentamiento con Antonia. Ricardo trata su problema de impotencia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia es sacada de su hacienda esposada; Balmaceda es obligado a llevársela cargándola. Verónica le da pistas al comisionado acerca de Guerra. Lucho teme que el mismo policía que lo llevó a prisión descubra todo. David es sorprendido con su novia.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le inventa a Norma que es novia de Juan, él no se queda tranquilo, busca a la madre de su hijo y trata de aclarar todo cuando otra mentira los separa. Franco pone a Armando en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma cae otra vez en la farsa de Dínora quien se ingenia una insólita historia con Gabriela de cómplice, Martín sospecha de su hija. Jimena regresa con tropiezos a la filmación del comercial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: George Kambosos vs Devin Haney 1

programme.title: Hector Camacho vs Sugar Ray Leonard

programme.title: Humberto Soto vs Urbano Antillon
programme.desc: On December 4th, 2010, Humberto Soto fought Urbano Antillon for the WBC World Lightweight Title at the Honda Center in Anaheim. In a very close fight that could have gone either way, Soto came out on top victorious via an unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 1
programme.desc: On June 6th, 1988 Iran Barkley faces Thomas Hearns for the first time at the Las Vegas Hilton Center they battle for the WBC World Middleweight title with the bout lasting 3 rounds resulting in a victory for Barkley.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 2
programme.desc: On March 20th, 1992 Iran Barkley and Thomas Hearns fought for a second time at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas for WBA World Light heavyweight title, the fight resulted in a split decision win for Barkley.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Adam Lopez

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Jessie Magdaleno

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Carl Frampton

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Masayuki Ito
programme.desc: On May 25th, 2019 Jamel Herring and Masayuki Ito battled for the WBO super featherweight title in a 12 round bout at Osceola Heritage Park in Kissimmee, Fl. That ended in a unanimous decision victory for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Shakur Stevenson
programme.desc: On October 23rd, 2021, Shakur Stevenson fought Jamel Herring for the WBO World Super Featherweight Title at State Farm Arena in Atlanta. A much quicker Shakur dominated from the start, finishing Herring in the tenth round.

programme.title: James Toney vs Charles Williams

programme.title: James Toney vs Dave Tiberi

programme.title: James Toney vs Freddie Delgado

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: On his way to help a man and his daughter over a land dispute, Paladin encounters a wealthy, drunk and helpless man whose guide left him behind to die.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Shakespearean actors are going to perform in San Diego during their roundup. They are in for a rough reception.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Sid Morgan hires Paladin to protect him from someone who is trying to kill him. After killing the gunfighter who was following them, Paladin finds out the real reason Morgan hired him.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: John Kellaway, who is running for mayor of Colton, Wyoming, hires Paladin to protect him from his opposition.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is traveling on a stagecoach with four others, one of whom is Della White Cloud, the educated daughter of an Apache chief.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin wins part of a treasure map in a poker game and goes in search of the treasure with three other men.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Juliet Harper is being hunted by the grandsons of Colonel Jeremiah Pike. Paladin meets her on the stage and now the Colonel is after both of them, and Paladin is without a gun.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Returning to Tombstone with lawyer Gay Monahan, Hollister is just in time to prevent a gunfight between mine owner Big Jim Gerson and his manager, Feeny Spindler. Spindler hires the lady lawyer who digs up some surprising facts and a frozen body.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister investigates a series of mysterious deaths among the silver miners and links Lily Murdock, the town's most respected woman, with the tragedies. Lily is so well-liked by the townspeople that the sheriff dares not accuse her openly.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Marshal Vern Fawcett turns in his badge after accidentally shooting an outlaw in the back. When Holcomb's three vengeful brothers ride into Tombstone, Sheriff Hollister helps Fawcett regain his courage for the fight against lawlessness.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister rushes a young, wounded hoodlum to Tombstone's hospital, putting him under the care of nurse Mary Rice. But when the notorious Gayleyville gang kidnaps her and the dying boy, Hollister and the wounded man each attempt to save the nurse.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Fragments of the Epitaphs are found at the scene of a robbery and on the body of a known killer. Hollister and Claibourne discover a strange code in the help wanted ads and, with a planned typographic 'error,' they smoke out a robbery gang.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Liz Dolthan stands by as Hollister opens a safe to deposit personal valuables belonging to the stagecoach passengers. When the safe is robbed, Hollister devises a ruse to make Liz reveal the fact that she has an amazing memory.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) faces off against a brother (Andrew Prine) and his beautiful sister (June Blair), both of whom are looking to avenge the death of their notorious outlaw father, Jonas Bell. And Hollister is the target.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: It's Sheriff Clay Hollister's duty to hang murderer Sam Edwards. However, on a fateful morning, his brother appears, armed with a case of dynamite. Saving Sam from the gallows, his brother abducts Editor Harris Claibourne to hold him hostage.

programme.desc: When a babysitting client says, "You're my favorite babysitter ever", Sam and Cat debate which one of them he meant. They compete for their new clients' affection to see who really is the best babysitter.

programme.title: Victorious: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Victorious: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Victorious: A Film by Dale Squires
programme.desc: When a hot young filmmaker comes to Hollywood Arts, the kids are excited to work on his project. But when the film is released, and they aren't given credit, the kids turn to revenge.

programme.title: Victorious: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck, and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Victorious: The Diddly-Bops
programme.desc: Sikowitz recruits the gang to form a children's band for a friend's party. When a leaked video of the group's performance becomes popular, Andre struggles to be taken seriously as a musician.

programme.title: Victorious: Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Cat begins dating Tori's ex-boyfriend, Danny (Matt Angel) and Tori becomes jealous. Meanwhile, Trina convinces Robbie, Andre, Jade and Beck to indulge their feet in callus-eating fish that she's been buying from some stranger.
